name: Futuristic Control Panel
description: A dense interactive control panel with tactile switches, sliders, toggles, gauges, and a segmented status display, in a sleek futuristic industrial aesthetic. Emphasis on clear affordance, grouped controls, and live feedback on every interaction.

requiredElements.name: grouped-controls
requiredElements.description: Controls grouped into logical sections with labels (e.g., Power, Navigation, Diagnostics).

requiredElements.name: tactile-affordance
requiredElements.description: Each control (switch/slider/toggle) has a clear tactile affordance and current state readout.

requiredElements.name: live-feedback
requiredElements.description: Every interaction gives immediate live feedback (value change, state glow, gauge needle move).

requiredElements.name: gauges
requiredElements.description: At least one analog-style gauge or meter showing a continuous value.

requiredElements.name: segmented-display
requiredElements.description: A segmented/7-segment-style numeric display for key readouts, reinforcing the industrial aesthetic.

optionalElements.name: master-arming
optionalElements.description: A master arm/enable switch that gates other controls (safety pattern).

optionalElements.name: warning-states
optionalElements.description: Threshold-based warning/critical color states on gauges.

qualityRules.description: Controls are grouped logically with clear section labels.
Each control's type and state are immediately readable.
Live feedback on every interaction; no dead controls.
Gauges read current value at a glance (needle + numeric).
Segmented displays reinforce the industrial aesthetic.
Control styling, spacing, and state colors consistent across the panel.
Value readouts have high contrast against panel backgrounds.
Interactive controls are real buttons/inputs with focusable state and aria labels.
All controls operable via keyboard (tab + space/enter/arrows).
Gauge/value updates don't trigger layout (transform/opacity only).
State colors and spacing as design tokens.

antiPatterns.description: Controls that don't respond or show state feel broken.
Toggles/switches with no visible on/off state confuse the operator.
Interactive controls as divs without focus/keyboard support fail accessibility.
Gauges that animate via width/layout cause repaint cost.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add threshold-based warning/critical color states on gauges.
Add a master arm switch gating dangerous controls.

exampleOutputs.label: Tactile toggle with state
